generated_oml:
instance LabEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Lab environment for gantry crane system"
    base:contains SwingAngleEncoder, Anemometer, ArduinoSensing, CartStepperMotor, HoistStepperMotor, TMC4671EvalMotorController, Electromagnet, CADModel, KinematicModel, TimeSeriesData, TimescaleDBDatabase, GrafanaDashboard, EclipseMosquittoMQTTBroker, DockerContainerization, PythonGantrylibModule, ArduinoHardwareControl, AutodeskFusion360CAD, OptimalTrajectoryGenerationService, SimulationService, ContinuousValidationService, HistoricalDataLoggingService, DataVisualizationService, OptimalTrajectory, SimulationResult, OperatorNotification, DataStorageInsight, DashboardVisualization, CapellaModelBasedSystemsEngineering, DarTwinNotation, CustomDriverBoardExtension, PhysicalSimulatorExtension
]

instance GantryCraneSystem : DTDFVocab:SystemUnderStudy [
    base:desc "Lab-scale gantry crane inspired by Antwerp harbor cranes, moving small pucks (representing containers) between locations"
    DTDFVocab:hasEnvironment LabEnvironment
]

instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:DTComponent [
    base:desc "Swing Angle Encoder for measuring hoist swinging motion"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance Anemometer : DTDFVocab:DTComponent [
    base:desc "Anemometer for wind speed measurement"
    DTDFVocab:producedData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance ArduinoSensing : DTDFVocab:DTComponent [
    base:desc "Arduino for sensor control and data acquisition"
    DTDFVocab:producedData ArduinoDataTransmitted
]

instance SwingAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DTComponent [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]

instance WindSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DTComponent [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Anemometer
]

instance ArduinoDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DTComponent [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ArduinoSensing
]

instance SwingAngleData : DTDFVocab:DTComponent [
    base:desc "Swing angle measurements"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBDatabase
]

instance WindSpeedData : DTDFVocab:DTComponent [
    base:desc "Wind speed measurements"
    DTDFVocab:fromData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBDatabase
]

instance ArduinoData : DTDFVocab:DTComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor control and data acquisition data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ArduinoDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonGantrylibModule
]

instance TimeSeriesData : DTDFVocab:DTComponent [
    base:desc "Time-series data stored in TimescaleDB database"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleDataTransmitted, WindSpeedDataTransmitted, ArduinoDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBDatabase
]

instance CADModel : DTDFVocab:DTComponent [
    base:desc "CAD models (Autodesk Fusion360)"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonGantrylibModule
]

instance KinematicModel : DTDFVocab:DTComponent [
    base:desc "Kinematic model of the crane"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonGantrylibModule
]

instance TimescaleDBDatabase : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "TimescaleDB for database"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService, ContinuousValidationService, DataVisualizationService
]

instance GrafanaDashboard : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Grafana for dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataVisualizationService
]

instance EclipseMosquittoMQTTBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Mosquitto for MQTT broker"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

instance DockerContainerization : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Docker for containerization"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalTrajectoryGenerationService, SimulationService, ContinuousValidationService, HistoricalDataLoggingService, DataVisualizationService
]

instance PythonGantrylibModule : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python for gantrylib module"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalTrajectoryGenerationService, SimulationService
]

instance ArduinoHardwareControl : DTDFVocab:DTComponent [
    base:desc "Arduino for hardware control"
]

instance AutodeskFusion360CAD : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Autodesk Fusion360 for CAD"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService
]

instance OptimalTrajectoryGenerationService : DTDFVocab:DTComponent [
    base:desc "Optimal trajectory generation using kinematic model"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalTrajectory
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:DTComponent [
    base:desc "simulation service for trajectory execution"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationResult
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:DTComponent [
    base:desc "continuous validation comparing measurements with simulations"
    DTDFVocab:provides OperatorNotification
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:DTComponent [
    base:desc "historical data logging"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataStorageInsight
]

instance DataVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:DTComponent [
    base:desc "data visualization via Grafana dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:provides DashboardVisualization
]

instance OptimalTrajectory : DTDFVocab:DTComponent [
    base:desc "Generated optimal trajectory for crane movement"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance SimulationResult : DTDFVocab:DTComponent [
    base:desc "Simulation results for trajectory execution"
]

instance OperatorNotification : DTDFVocab:DTComponent [
    base:desc "Operators notified via dashboard when validation thresholds are breached"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance DataStorageInsight : DTDFVocab:DTComponent [
    base:desc "Data stored in TimescaleDB for historical analysis"
]

instance DashboardVisualization : DTDFVocab:DTComponent [
    base:desc "Data visualization via Grafana dashboard"
]

instance CartStepperMotor : DTDFVocab:DTComponent [
    base:desc "Cart stepper motor controlled by TMC4671-Eval motor controller"
]

instance HoistStepperMotor : DTDFVocab:DTComponent [
    base:desc "Hoist stepper motor controlled by TMC4671-Eval motor controller"
]

instance TMC4671EvalMotorController : DTDFVocab:DTComponent [
    base:desc "TMC4671-Eval motor controller for stepper motors"
]

instance Electromagnet : DTDFVocab:DTComponent [
    base:desc "Electromagnet for picking up containers"
]

instance CapellaModelBasedSystemsEngineering : DTDFVocab:DTComponent [
    base:desc "Model-Based Systems Engineering (Capella models)"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DarTwinNotation
]

instance DarTwinNotation : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "DarTwin notation for system evolution"
]

instance CustomDriverBoardExtension : DTDFVocab:DTComponent [
    base:desc "Planned future extension: custom driver board"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance PhysicalSimulatorExtension : DTDFVocab:DTComponent [
    base:desc "Planned future extension: physical simulator"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands (e.g., optimal movement trajectories) sent from Control Application via Physical Crane Interface to the physical crane's motors and electromagnet."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Continuous real-time synchronization for data logging and validation, with no specific time interval specified in the document."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestration of physical crane (hardware), physical crane interface, control application, logging application, HMI, and digital twin services (database, dashboard, trajectory generator, simulation, continuous validation, MQTT broker) connected via Docker containers and MQTT protocol."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "As designed (CAD models) and as operated (real-time monitoring and validation via continuous validation service)."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Continuous validation service compares measurements with simulations, calculates distance metrics against a threshold, and notifies operators when breached; confidence bounds derived from simulation (Fig 8)."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol (Eclipse Mosquitto) for inter-service communication; Python interfaces for physical crane control and data logging."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Hosted on personal computer with Docker containerized components (database, MQTT broker, dashboard); Python modules installed via pip."
]
